text: Just updated to v4.2 and honestly the app feels SO much snappier. Loading times went from 5s to under 1s. Finally 🚀
Anyone else getting a white screen after login? Tried clearing cache, reinstalling, nothing works. Been 2 days now.
The new pricing tier is insane. $29/mo for features that were free last month?? How is this acceptable
Shoutout to @support_team - they fixed my billing issue in under 10 minutes. That's how customer service should work 👍
lol yeah the app is 'fast' now, if you consider crashing every 5 minutes fast 🙄
Genuinely impressed with the new dashboard UI. Clean, intuitive, actually makes me want to use the product more.
Three failed payments in a row. Support told me to 'try again later.' That's literally your whole response?? 😡
Maintenance scheduled for tonight 10PM-2AM EST. Plan accordingly.
switched from competitor X to this last week. night and day difference in build quality. actually works as advertised
The premium plan price increase is justified imo. You get API access, priority support, and 10x the storage. Fair deal.
My export feature has been broken for 3 weeks. I've submitted 4 tickets. FOUR. Still no fix. This is unacceptable for enterprise.
not gonna lie the new onboarding flow is 🔥. took me 2 min to set everything up vs the old 20 min nightmare
Is anyone else's notification system completely broken or just me? Getting alerts for things from 3 days ago
Best. Update. Ever. The search functionality actually returns relevant results now. Game changer for our team.
Product is trending on HN today but maybe fix the bugs first before celebrating? Just a thought 🤷
Support just hung up on me after 45 minutes of hold. Second time this week. Absolutely pathetic service. 💀
The mobile app redesign is gorgeous. Whoever did the UX work deserves a raise honestly
Am I the only one who thinks the new pricing is actually reasonable? Compare it to any competitor and it's cheaper
Login broken. Search broken. Notifications broken. But hey at least the loading animation looks cool right? 😐
We migrated our entire 200-person team to this platform last quarter. Zero regrets. Support has been fantastic.
Tried to cancel my subscription and got redirected in circles for 20 minutes. Dark pattern much?
Quick PSA: if you're getting the 502 error, clear cookies and use incognito. Worked for me.
The AI assistant feature is genuinely useful. Saved me 2 hours of manual data entry today alone 😊
Absolute joke of a company. Charged me twice, took 2 weeks to refund, only refunded one charge. Never again.
New API documentation is super well-written. Props to the dev team for making integration painless.
The product itself is fine but the PRICE. $29 for basic? $79 for pro? In this economy??? 📉
Just hit 1 year as a customer. The platform has improved SO much since I started. Keep it up team! ❤️
Buggy mess. Crashes on iOS 18, crashes on Android 15, crashes on desktop. What DOESN'T it crash on?
Honestly the free tier is more than enough for small teams. Very generous compared to alternatives.
Their 'enterprise support' is a guy named Dave who takes 72 hours to reply. For $500/mo. Think about that.
New collaboration features are 🔥🔥🔥 finally can co-edit docs without everything breaking
WARNING: do NOT update to latest version. It wiped all my saved templates. No way to recover. Backup first.
The competitor just launched a free tier that does everything this charges $29 for. Awkward timing lmao
Customer for 3 years. Quality has been consistently great. The team clearly cares about the product.
Support agent was incredibly patient with my dumb questions. Walked me through everything step by step. 10/10 experience
Whoever decided to remove the bulk export feature in the name of 'simplification' needs to reconsider. That was essential.
RT @techreview Great analysis of the new pricing model — spoiler: it's not as bad as Twitter makes it seem
The desktop app uses 3GB of RAM doing NOTHING. How is this even possible? Is it mining crypto?? 💀
Upgraded to Pro tier yesterday. The advanced analytics alone are worth it. Should've done this months ago
Y'all need to fix your payment system. Failed transaction → account locked → support says 'wait 48 hours.' Not okay.
The dark mode implementation is *chef's kiss*. Finally an app that doesn't blind me at 2am
Second outage this week. If I'm paying for '99.9% uptime' I expect better than this. Considering switching.
Small thing but the keyboard shortcuts they added are brilliant. Ctrl+K search is so fast now
Was excited about the AI features but they're basically just ChatGPT with a wrapper. Disappointed tbh
Migrating from this product ASAP. The data export takes 6 hours for 500MB. In 2026. Seriously.
Their blog post about the pricing change was refreshingly honest. Respect the transparency at least.
New integrations with Slack and Notion are seamless. This is how ecosystem building should work 👍
Worst customer service experience of my life. Rep literally told me 'that's not our problem' about THEIR bug.
The security audit report they published is impressive. SOC2 + ISO27001 + regular pen testing. Enterprise ready fr
Love how they added 2FA with biometrics. Most apps still only offer SMS codes in 2026 smh
Can someone explain why the mobile app needs access to my contacts, camera, AND location for a productivity tool?
Fantastic webinar today on the new features. The product team actually listens to feedback. Rare these days.
'Oh you want to export YOUR data? That'll be $50 extra on the premium plan' — actual pricing in 2026
File upload speed went from terrible to blazing fast after the CDN update. Noticeable improvement 🚀
Third time my project was corrupted after auto-save. I've lost hours of work. Where's the version history?
Hot take: the product is actually better than people give it credit for. Most complaints are about pricing not quality
The calendar sync feature works flawlessly with Google Cal and Outlook. Finally a unified view of everything
Built our entire startup workflow around this tool. 40 employees, zero issues in 8 months. Can't recommend enough 😊
BREAKING: major data breach reported. User emails and hashed passwords potentially exposed. Change your passwords NOW
The offline mode they added is a lifesaver for travel. Works perfectly on flights with no wifi 👍
Why does the basic plan now have a 5-user limit when it was unlimited before? This kills it for small nonprofits
Reporting a bug: the date picker shows 2025 dates as default. Minor but annoying for daily users
Absolute garbage. Paid for annual plan, features got removed mid-year, no prorated refund offered. Borderline scam.
The learning curve is steep but once you get it, it's incredibly powerful. Tip: watch their YouTube tutorials first
Just cancelled. The price-to-value ratio has gotten worse with every update this year. Sad because I loved v3.
Speed test results: page load 0.8s, search 0.3s, file open 1.2s. Actually competitive with native apps now
The community Discord is incredibly helpful. Found answers to every question I had within minutes
Failed checkout → lost my cart → support says they can't recover it. $200 in items gone. Absolutely fuming 😡
